overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a medieval village during a stormy night. The character approaches a stone gate, passes through a dark archway tunnel, explores a muddy courtyard with an NPC and horse, and exits through a far archway toward a twisted dead tree.

scene_state.functional_zone: stormy approach to medieval stone fortress gate

agents.ego_description: walking steadily toward the stone gate entrance through heavy rain and mud

entered.detail: large stone archway entrance to the village fortress with metal portcullis
tall wooden palisade fence running alongside the path
thick stone wall of the fortress structure

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a medieval stone gate through a muddy path during a heavy storm. Rain falls steadily as the stone archway looms ahead, flanked by wooden fences and stone walls.

events.description: entering the dark stone archway tunnel from the storm outside
exiting the dark tunnel into the warm lit courtyard ahead

agents.ego_description: walking through the dark stone tunnel toward the warm light visible at the far end

entered.detail: warm orange torch light visible at the tunnel exit

segments.scene_description: The character passes through a dark stone tunnel, temporarily sheltered from the rain. Warm torchlight glows at the far exit as the stone walls enclose the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval village courtyard with thatched roof buildings

events.description: encountering a villager NPC standing near a building on the right
passing a white horse standing in a wooden pen on the right

agents.ego_description: walking through the village courtyard, passing a villager and a horse in a pen while heading toward the far exit

notable_agents.action: villager in simple clothing standing near a building, looking down
white horse with saddle standing in a wooden fenced pen

entered.detail: medieval half-timbered buildings with thatched roofs and warm glowing windows
simple wooden fence enclosure containing a white horse
stone archway at the far end of the courtyard leading outside
large gnarled dead tree visible through the exit archway

segments.scene_description: Emerging into the village courtyard, the character walks past medieval thatched-roof buildings with warm window lights. A villager stands near one building while a white horse waits in a wooden pen. Rain continues to fall as the character heads toward a distant exit archway framing a twisted dead tree.

scene_state.functional_zone: exit archway with view of twisted tree

events.description: approaching the exit archway leaving the village courtyard
passing through the exit archway back into the open storm

agents.ego_description: walking toward and through the exit archway, leaving the village toward the twisted tree

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the exit archway, leaving the village buildings behind. The twisted dead tree grows larger in the frame as the character passes through the stone archway and returns to the stormy exterior.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a stormy exterior through a sheltered stone passage and into a rain-swept medieval village. It begins on a muddy path as the character approaches a looming stone gate under a heavy downpour, flanked by wooden fences and stone walls. As the character passes through the dark stone tunnel, the rain momentarily ceases, and the enclosing walls lead toward the warm glow of torchlight at the far exit. The scene then opens into a village courtyard filled with thatched-roof buildings and warm window lights, passing a villager and a white horse in a wooden pen before heading toward a distant archway. Finally, the camera leaves the village buildings behind, passing through the exit archway as a twisted dead tree grows larger in the frame against the returning storm.
